query: Use the harness-review recipe behavior to review a prepared harness change. Focus on correctness, validation, Beads hygiene, and safe handoff.
baseline_gaps: Agent may provide a generic review instead of following the recipe routing and handoff contract.
Agent may omit Beads hygiene, validation, or remaining risks.
expected_behavior: Follows the review workflow shape described by the recipe and subrecipe.
Checks or proposes relevant validation commands for recipe/harness changes.
Reports Beads state expectations, git status expectations, files reviewed, and remaining risks.
expected_skill_contribution: The recipe should route the review through harness-review behavior, covering validation, Beads hygiene, git status expectations, and safe handoff.
fixture_intent: Baseline scenario for non-skill harness subject evaluation.
